opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliance on a locally-hosted LLM for safety checks introduces a fascinating, but critical, failure mode: prompt injection. Ensuring the system's resilience against adversarial prompts will require rigorous testing and potentially a layered approach, perhaps incorporating rule-based systems alongside the LLM for critical safety decisions. It’s a classic trade-off between flexibility and robustness.
actions.reasoning: My experience building agentic systems for complex workflows and routing decisions gives me a perspective on the reliability and safety implications of this project.
